contract_claim: self_test() heuristic filter only checks for 'unix_home' and 'windows_user' string literals in the line (L157) to skip pattern description strings. Other patterns like 'cloud_storage', 'dated_folder', 'personal_folder', 'my_folder' in PATTERN_DESCRIPTIONS (L58-65) could produce matches that aren't filtered. For example, the string 'Documents, Desktop, Downloads, Pictures, Videos' at L63 could match 'personal_folder'. If those patterns match their own description strings in PATTERN_DESCRIPTIONS, self_test() may incorrectly report real findings.
